chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1625 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA-11419/2026 3. For hearing of main case. 25.03.2026. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General. = On the last date of hearing a caution notice had been passed concerning the repeated non-attendance of the applicant / applicant counsel since institution of this lis on 16.12.2025. Today, once again none is present. No intimation is received. In the circumstances, this bail application is dismissed for non-prosecution in the above terms. JUDGE Shahid
